list.title: GDPR erasure requests
list.subtitle: Article 17 of the GDPR. All actions on this page are audited.

wizard.title: New GDPR erasure request
wizard.irreversible_warning: Erasure is irreversible. Once executed, the case and its derived artefacts cannot be recovered.
wizard.study_id_help: Paste the UUID of the study to erase. The study must belong to your tenant.
wizard.justification_help: Documented reason. Minimum 10 characters. Will appear on the confirmation PDF.
wizard.justification_placeholder: e.g., Data subject request received 2025-04-10 — Art. 17(1)(a) consent withdrawn.
wizard.mfa_body: Confirm your identity. You will be prompted for a fresh multi-factor check before submission.
wizard.mfa_help: If step-up is required, a secure prompt will appear at submission time.
wizard.review_irreversible: After submission the case, its segmentations, lesions, reports, and deliveries will be permanently removed. Audit events are retained but residual identifiers are hashed.
wizard.confirm_phrase_help: Type {{phrase}} (all caps) to unlock the Execute button.
wizard.executing_body: Running the erasure pipeline. This usually finishes within 60 seconds.
wizard.step_up_required: Fresh multi-factor authentication required. Please retry after re-authenticating.
wizard.timeout_body: The erasure did not complete within 90 seconds. Check the ops dashboard or retry.

confirmation.title: Erasure completed
confirmation.body: The case and its derived artefacts have been erased. A confirmation PDF has been generated.
confirmation.tombstone_help: Cryptographic anchor linking this confirmation PDF to the audit log entry. Keep with your compliance records.
confirmation.pdf_pending: PDF render pending — refresh in a moment
